allow: Bash(python3 -c "import json, urllib.request; resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(''''https://api.github.com/repos/AgentSmithers/DnSpy-MCPserver-Extension/releases''''\); data = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\); print\(json.dumps\(data[0] if data else {}, indent=2\)\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, urllib.request; resp = urllib.request.urlopen\(''https://api.github.com/repos/AgentSmithers/DnSpy-MCPserver-Extension/releases''\); data = json.loads\(resp.read\(\)\); asset = data[0][''assets''][0]; print\(f''Asset: {asset[""name""]}\\nDownload URL: {asset[""browser_download_url""]}\\nSize: {asset[""size""]} bytes''\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f''''Default branch: {data.get\(""default_branch""\)}\\nForks: {data.get\(""forks_count""\)}\\nStars: {data.get\(""stargazers_count""\)}\\nLanguages: {data.get\(""language""\)}''''\)")
Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{item[""name""]} \({item[""type""]}\)''''\) for item in data]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{item[""name""]} \({item[""type""]}\)''''\) for item in data[:20]]")
Bash(python3 -c "import json, sys; data = json.load\(sys.stdin\); [print\(f''''{item[""name""]}: {item[""browser_download_url""]}''''\) for item in data]")
